title: Wynncraft 101
body:
A Simple modpack for playing Wynncraft.


Class Selection
Better third person
Custom Questbook
In-game map
# Description

This modpack's main goal is to provide a simple/streamlined experience for wynncraft. Only the most important (In my opinion) mods are included.

Performance Comparison
# Features: - Minimap, Better Contentbook and many other quality of life tweaks thanks to **Wynntils** - Full voice acting with **Voices of Wynn** - Shaderpack support with **Complementary Shaders - Unbound** preinstalled - Custom Wynncraft themed Main Menu - Better third person mode with **Shoulder Surfing Reloaded** - Big performance boost ([Performance comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yvC0d6Q6/images/402d8eea4abae00c5c6d3ba6ae77033da8cf9333.png)) - Zoom by pressing **C**
All induced mods: 1.21 - [Cloth Config v17](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g) - [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/ETlrkaYF) - [Drippy Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/v3CYg2V9) - [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ha28R6CL) - [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wq5SjeWM) - [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/ohNO6lps) - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) - [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U) - [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/J81TRJWm) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) - [Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/EMQzFaJ1) - [Melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/CVT4pFB2) - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/nmDcB62a) - [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/hg77g4Pw) - [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/aXf2OSFU) - [Shoulder Surfing Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/kepjj2sy) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) - [Voices of Wynn](https://modrinth.com/mod/Hn8Ot3qH) - [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/dU5Gb9Ab) - [Wynntils](https://wynntils.com) - [Wynntils](https://wynntils.com) - [YOSBR](https://modrinth.com/mod/WwbubTsV)


Epic screenshot of the Main Menu

If you are interested in a modpack with more features I recommend you to check out Wynnic Enchantments by Rafii

# Disclaimer
This modpack is fan made! Unaffiliated with Mojang or Wynncraft
